mnemonics: CRUD Mnemonic: Create (POST), Read (GET), Update (PUT/PATCH), Delete (DELETE)
keyPoints: REST APIs use standard HTTP methods for operations
Resources are identified by URLs and representations like JSON
Stateless communication where each request contains all necessary information
commonMistakes: Using GET requests for operations that change server state
Designing endpoints that are not resource-oriented (e.g., /getUsers instead of /users)
Storing session state on the server, violating statelessness principle
